   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 18, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Ruben Valenzuela_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "Terrible App... Do Not Pay For Subscription, They Can Freeze The Assets Sometimes Causing Loss Of Money When Most Needed, Plus They Won't Let You Do Anything In The App, HowEver You Will End Up Losing Money And Time, There Are Other Good Apps And More COMING UP Next These Next Years."
            2. _J_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "Stupid app. Can't even put in your postcode. You delete your postcode, it pastes it in twice. You delete again, it pastes it in three times. And so on, and so on. Endless glitchy cycle. Never seen such a stupid thing before"
            3. _Danish Aftab_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "chaarts no longer load in advanced mode. app constantly freezes. have to force close every time to use it."
